# P-C-006 — Premature escalation-clause activation

> Activation abusive de clause de révision

## Description (EN)

Escalation clause activated before the contractual trigger threshold was met.

## Description (FR)

La clause de révision a été activée avant que le seuil contractuel ne soit atteint.

<!-- END auto-generated -->

## Detection logic

Escalation-clause abuse — invocation of the price-revision clause without the contractually-required external trigger (commodity-index movement, FX threshold).

## Likelihood-ratio reasoning

Default prior 0.16 + weight 0.65. Direct evidence of bad-faith application of an otherwise legitimate clause.

## Known false-positive traps

- **Documented external trigger** that the pattern's data source missed.

## Production wiring

Requires the contract's escalation-clause text (extractor surfaces `has_escalation_clause`) AND a recent amendment event AND an external CPI/FX feed.
